title: FNAF Music Discs
description: This Textrue pack adds FNAF songs and replaces Minecraft's music discs with FNAF songs.
body:
Have you ever wanted FNAF songs in Minecraft Java Edition? If so, this resource pack is just what you are looking for. This resource pack replaces Minecraft's music discs with FNAF songs. 

Current songs included:
Just Gold by MandoPony
Left Behind by DAGames
Join Us For A Bite by JT Music.

Just put music disc 13, cat, and blocks inside the jukebox, and the songs will play.

More songs may be added in future Updates!
